computeTargets.label: Local
computeTargets.description: Runs the simulation on this machine through the local worker.

computeTargets.label: Cloud
computeTargets.description: Reserved for remote worker execution in a later phase.

qualityPresets.label: Preview
qualityPresets.description: Fast external aero preview with a coarse mesh and short solve.

qualityPresets.label: Standard
qualityPresets.description: Reserved for a refined mesh and longer solve.

qualityPresets.label: High
qualityPresets.description: Reserved for the highest local/cloud accuracy path.

resourceCaps.label: Balanced
resourceCaps.description: Uses a moderate share of the machine.

resourceCaps.label: Max Speed
resourceCaps.description: Uses the largest local allocation available to the worker.
